noProjects: No projects found in this category.

project1.title: Smart Irrigation System
project1.desc: An IoT-based automated irrigation system that monitors soil moisture and weather conditions to optimize water usage.

project2.title: Line Follower Robot
project2.desc: A high-speed line-following robot built for robotics competitions using Arduino and IR sensors.

project3.title: Campus Navigation App
project3.desc: A mobile application that helps students navigate the university campus with interactive maps.

project4.title: Solar Tracker
project4.desc: A dual-axis solar tracking system that maximizes solar panel efficiency by following the sun's path.

project5.title: Voice Assistant Device
project5.desc: A custom voice-controlled assistant built with Raspberry Pi for home automation tasks.

project6.title: Weather Station
project6.desc: An IoT weather station that collects and displays real-time environmental data.
